title: Conyza ruwenzoriensis

intro: Conyza ruwenzoriensis, commonly known as Ruwenzori fleabane, is an annual herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which can help to alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Conyza ruwenzoriensis include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, Conyza ruwenzoriensis is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory and skin issues.
